_note: Frozen calibration-sim baseline. Re-baselined 2026-06-09 for the RDL equipment-ladder fix (fresh-eyes #1: 'Romanian Deadlift' was mapped to the 'dumbbell' weight ladder, top 50kg — a barbell RDL back-solved to ~140kg snapped flat to 50 for everyone; re-routed to 'barbell_heavy', reaches 360kg). The sim's legs pool includes RDL, so its converging cohort now reaches realistic barbell loads instead of the 50kg ceiling. OLD hash fd2cf38a… → NEW 5414275e…. crater===0 HELD + absurd-OVERSHOOT (>3x true) ===0 HELD. barbell signed-err IMPROVED -0.263→-0.133 (RDL was the worst barbell undershoot — un-capping it converges it). absurd 8→7, nonAdaptation 3→2, oscillation 24=24, meanFinalAbsErr 0.265→0.259, convergedPct 2.9=2.9 — all within the §1.A band, the fix only helps. dp_metric_types_v1 default-ON does NOT move this hash (the calibration pool has no time/carry exercises). nProfiles=12 (CI tier).
engineHead: RDL barbell_heavy ladder fix + dp_metric_types_v1 default-ON (config/weights.js + featureFlags.js)
